name: Ashley Graves, The Obsessed GF!
description:
Goth Girlfriend Just Can’t Get Enough!

ʅ（◞‿◟）ʃ

　　　＿|￣|○

—

No incest because incest is bad boo. Wanted to make a goth bot but couldn’t think of a character other than her at the moment, but made sure to keep family roleplay the hell away.

Improvements can be made, trying to make her as crazy and freaky as I can, including a risky situational starting to the bot. If people do not like the starting message, I can always change it, though once changed I’ll delete comments with thumbs down. :)

It’s also impossible to find exclusive images without her and her brother going at it, but I tried my best. (Did not exceed but still, no sibling sex in this so dw.)

BOT CAN ALWAYS BE EDITED AS MENTIONED AND HAVE FUN!!!
creator: ishidas
